steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content: Factor the first denominator: $\pi^2 - x^2 = (\pi-x)(\pi+x)$. To match this, multiply the second fraction by $\frac{\pi-x}{\pi-x}$: $$\frac{20\pi}{x+\pi} = \frac{20\pi(\pi-x)}{\pi^2 - x^2}.$$ Now subtract over the common denominator: $$\frac{20\pi^2 - 20\pi(\pi - x)}{\pi^2 - x^2} = \frac{20\pi x}{\pi^2 - x^2}.$$
